prediction.reasoning: As an AI, I do not have access to real-time market data beyond my last training update, nor can I perform financial analysis, technical charting, or fundamental valuation. The confidence intervals are constructed using general heuristics for historical stock price fluctuations, widening for higher confidence levels to account for potential market sentiment shifts, company-specific news, or broader economic factors. These are generalized ranges and do not constitute financial advice or a guarantee of future performance.
